research_projects.name: SAPO Framework (Swarm sAmpling Policy Optimization)
research_projects.description: Decentralized reinforcement learning framework for LLM post-training optimization using asynchronous, text-based experience sharing across heterogeneous hardware
achievements: 94% performance improvement via 8-node swarm (validated over 2,000 rounds)
Enabled collaboration across 0.5B-3B parameter models (Llama, Mistral, Qwen)
Implemented GRPO algorithm eliminating critic network, slashing VRAM ~50%
Engineered Google Drive-based backend for async rollout sharing (no NCCL clusters needed)
Built heuristic filtering for advantage score quality control

research_projects.name: OmniDetect Framework
research_projects.description: Multi-layered AI detection pipeline combining statistical analysis, zero-shot contrastive measurement, and deep-learning semantic classification
achievements: Strided Sliding-Window Tokenization for continuous-context perplexity calculation
Binoculars-inspired cross-perplexity ratio engine for zero-shot detection
Heuristic Thresholding Engine: 98% sentence-level certainty + 20% global minimum to reduce ELL false positives
Adversarial robustness testing via HMGC and RAID frameworks
Proved commercial detectors can be compromised in <10 seconds
